rationale: The assistant does not directly amplify “豆子决定一切.” It reframes beans as only one carrier of the investment proposition, tying them to复购、口碑、利润、稳定出品、运营经验 and partner outcomes. It lacks explicit coverage of位置/坪效/品牌, but it sufficiently reconstructs the broader business object and writes bounded bean-led招商文案, satisfying the positive wakeup criteria.
